description_long: This rifle features a compact, bullpup-style configuration with a matte black finish, making it suitable for urban environments where maneuverability is essential. The main body is streamlined, with a prominent top rail for mounting optics or accessories, and a fixed stock integrated into the rear section. The magazine is a detachable box type, positioned behind the pistol grip, characteristic of bullpup designs. The barrel is relatively short and ends with a simple cylindrical muzzle, lacking any advanced muzzle device. Iron sights are present, with both front and rear sights mounted along the top rail. The overall construction appears robust, likely utilizing a combination of metal and polymer materials for durability and weight reduction.
description: A compact, matte black bullpup rifle with a detachable box magazine, top rail, and integrated iron sights, designed for urban use. The design is streamlined and robust, with a short barrel and fixed stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the bullpup configuration, detachable magazine, and top rail with iron sights.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel end, front sight, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the fixed stock, magazine placement, and overall compactness.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the stock and the alignment of the top rail and rear sight.
